summary: Iteration 11 - Phase 4 Market Intelligence features tested comprehensively. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Market Intelligence page loads correctly with all 3 sections (Order Flow Analysis, Funding Rates, Whale Activity). Interactive features (symbol card clicks, refresh) work. All regression endpoints healthy.

issues: Pre-existing: Console error '<tr> cannot be child of <span>' hydration issue (cosmetic, not blocking, same as iteration 10)
Pre-existing: Recharts chart width/height -1 on initial load (cosmetic)

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase4_market_intel.py - Created Phase 4 Market Intelligence test suite (26 tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Market Intel page loads, all 3 sections visible, symbol card clicks work, whale stats correct, funding rates show ARB opportunities, navigation working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Market Intelligence fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/orderflow (symbols with pressure/imbalance_ratio/bid_walls/ask_walls), GET /api/orderflow/{symbol} (depth_levels/total_bid_volume/total_ask_volume/bid_walls/ask_walls - requires valid VALID_SYMBOLS), GET /api/funding-rates (rates per symbol with current_rate/sentiment/arb_opportunity/annualized_yield + has_opportunities flag), GET /api/whale-activity (whale_trades/total_whale_buys/total_whale_sells/net_flow/buy_count/sell_count/whale_signal/symbol_breakdown). All endpoints require JWT auth. Frontend: Market Intelligence page at /market-intel with 3 sections. Sidebar has Radar icon + 'Market Intel' nav item. Symbol cards have data-testid='of-{SYMBOL}'. Sections have data-testid='order-flow-section', 'funding-rates-section', 'whale-activity-section'. All market data is SIMULATED (Binance geo-restricted in Emergent preview). Previous iterations 1-10 cover Phase 1 (smart filters), Phase 2 (ML signal filter, mode toggle), Phase 3 (risk management: circuit breaker, sessions, regime detection, Monte Carlo).

fields: symbols (dict per symbol: pressure, imbalance_ratio, total_bid_volume, total_ask_volume, bid_walls, ask_walls, source)
rates (dict per symbol: current_rate, avg_rate_8h, sentiment, signal, arb_opportunity, annualized_yield, source)
symbol_breakdown (per-symbol: buy_volume, sell_volume, net_flow, count, signal)

mocked_api_note: All /api/orderflow, /api/orderflow/{symbol}, /api/funding-rates, /api/whale-activity endpoints return SIMULATED/SYNTHETIC data because Binance is geo-restricted in the Emergent preview environment. Source field in responses shows 'simulated'. This is expected behavior.
